  • Field Details

    • DEBUG

      public static boolean DEBUG
      The debug flag. This is set by the option when the platform is launch. Client should not try to reset this flag.

    • DEBUG_PREFIX

      public static final String DEBUG_PREFIX

    • handleGeneric

      public static void handleGeneric(IEventBEditor<?> editor, org.eclipse.jface.viewers.TreeViewer viewer, boolean up)
      Parameters:
      up - if up is true do handleUp else do handleDown

    • handle

      public static void handle(boolean up, IInternalElement first, IInternalElement previous, IInternalElement next)
      Move up or down the elements between first (include) and next (not include).
      Parameters:
      up - if up is true do handleUp else do handleDown
      first - the first element to move

      public static void debugAndLogError(Throwable e, String message)

    • getFreeInitialisationActionName

      public static String getFreeInitialisationActionName(IMachineRoot root)

    • getChildTowards

      public static IRodinElement getChildTowards(IRodinElement source, IRodinElement target)
      Returns the child of source which is an ancestor of target. The returned element is thus the element directly following source in a path going to target.

      In particular, if source is the parent of target, returns target, if source is the grand-parent of target, returns the parent of target, and so on.

      If source is not an ancestor of target, returns null as there is no path from source to target.

      Parameters:
      source - the source element
      target - the target element
      Returns:
      the child of source which is an ancestor of target or null if none

    • changeFocusWhenDispose

      public static void changeFocusWhenDispose(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite disposed, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent)
      Adds a dispose listener that gives the focus to another composite.
      Parameters:
      disposed - the composite to be listened to
      parent - the composite that will receive the focus

    • checkAndShowReadOnly

      public static boolean checkAndShowReadOnly(IRodinElement element)
      Returns whether the given element is read only. Additionally, if the given element is read only, this method informs the user through an info window.
      Parameters:
      element - an element to check
      Returns:
      true iff the given element is read only

    • copyElements

      public static void copyElements(IInternalElement target, IRodinElement[] elements)
      Perform a copy operation through the undo history.

      If the element type of elements to copy and the target are equals, the new elements is placed after target. Else the new element is placed at the end of the children list.

      Parameters:
      target - The selected element.
      elements - the elements to copy
